backend/main.mo: Main actor defining all data types (Vehicle, Visit, VisitorSession, Promotion, BlogPost, etc.) and including MixinStorage for blob storage and MixinAuthorization for access control with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (with visitorStats, dailyStatsMap, onlineUsersSet, sessionStorage) to new actor state by adding visitorSessions and visits maps while preserving existing visitorStats.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of visitor tracking middleware, real-time statistics display with auto-refresh, and visitor trend/top pages charts with high confidence mappings to test requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages (admin and public), components, hooks, and layouts with their primary responsibilities and data flow patterns.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (Beranda, Mobil, Promo, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and admin routes protected by AuthGuard, plus QueryClient and ThemeProvider setup.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (create only), using mutation hooks and toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Displays a table of admin users with edit and delete actions. Prevents deletion of the last remaining admin and shows loading skeletons during data fetch.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: Modal dialog for selecting banner images from uploaded media assets. Filters assets by 'banner' in filename and displays them in a radio-group grid with dimension recommendations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: Form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields. Validates delegation token expiry before submission and handles both create and update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Table listing all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions. Shows loading skeletons and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Grid display of uploaded media assets with preview thumbnails, copy-ID and delete actions. Shows confirmation dialog before deletion and handles both image and non-image file types.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: File upload component with drag-and-drop support for images and PDFs. Validates file types and sizes, checks token expiry before upload, and shows upload progress.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses React hooks for form state management and mutation hooks for create/update operations.
Table component displaying all passenger vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with their periods, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions and formats dates for Indonesian locale.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and handles timestamp generation for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete actions. Shows loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts, with loading and empty states. Truncates long URLs for display and shows full URLs in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts. Converts bigint timestamps to formatted dates and handles loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if identity is missing or expired, showing loader during initialization.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a list of 5 hardcoded recent articles with navigation to individual blog post pages. Each article is a clickable card with an icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons. Includes a dropdown menu with site navigation links that closes on outside clicks.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Allows users to select a vehicle variant from a list of buttons, automatically selecting the first variant on mount and notifying parent of selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Fetches and displays a CTA banner image from media assets with fallback to a generated static image. Shows skeleton loader while loading.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with company info, contact details, social media links, operating hours, and visitor statistics that auto-refresh every 15 seconds. Includes copyright and developer credit.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays different titles, icons, backgrounds, and subtexts based on the current pathname. Handles family vehicles, commercial vehicles, and various site sections.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel of up to 8 family vehicles fetched from the catalog API. Uses VehicleCard components within a responsive carousel with navigation controls.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles (Mobil Niaga) using vehicle catalog data and VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main banner image by fetching media assets and displaying 'Main Banner.png' with fallback to a generated static image.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu for site navigation including vehicle categories, promo, testimonials, blog, and contact pages.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for vehicle products with interaction counts and native share API integration.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of 4 featured vehicles (Produk Unggulan) from the vehicle catalog.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the mobil-keluarga page with search query parameters.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Displays three key selling points: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an official dealer with commitment to service.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector for vehicle variants and colors with button groups that triggers callback on selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, base price, and detail link with formatted Indonesian currency.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and UI text constants for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication and admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook to fetch admin dashboard statistics including vehicle counts, contacts, leads, blog posts, and visitor metrics (currently returns default values).
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: React Query hooks for managing admin users (CRUD operations) with authentication and network error handling; currently returns stubs as backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: React Query hooks for blog post management (fetch, create, update, delete) with error classification and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed and return empty data.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations; all backend methods are missing and return empty/null data with console warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Mutation hook for submitting contact form data; backend method is stubbed with console warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Query hook to fetch all contact submissions; returns empty array as backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Mutation hook for submitting credit simulation requests; backend method is stubbed with console warning.
Query hook to fetch all credit simulations; returns empty array as backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication with AuthClient, providing login/logout functionality and identity state management with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: React Query hooks for media asset management (fetch, upload, delete) with error handling and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed and not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: React Query hooks for product like/share interactions and counts; all backend methods are stubbed returning zero counts with console warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: React Query hooks for managing promotions (create, update, delete, get all) with authentication and network error handling. Currently returns stub data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching public vehicle catalog data. Returns empty arrays/null as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook for fetching website settings. Returns null as backend method is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: React Query hooks for managing testimonials (create, update, delete, get all) with authentication and network error handling. Currently returns stub data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: React Query hooks for managing vehicles (create, update, delete, get all, get by ID) with authentication and network error handling. Currently returns stub data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics, trends, and page views with configurable refetch intervals. Calls backend actor methods for analytics data.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: React hook that tracks page visits by collecting session, device, and browser data, then sends to backend actor. Skips tracking for admin routes and bots.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with authentication and network error handling. Currently returns stub data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile behavior, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promos, blog, media, leads, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, conditional HeroSection (hidden on homepage), Footer, BottomCTABar, and activates visitor tracking for all public pages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and cache invalidation on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the passenger vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulation submissions from visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays a sortable table of contact form submissions with name, email, message, and timestamp information.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid, includes cache invalidation on successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Passenger vehicle management page with list view and add/edit dialog for managing vehicle inventory.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Promotion management page with list view and add/edit dialog for managing promotional campaigns.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add, edit, and delete functionality using dialogs and confirmation alerts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, yearly, online users, page views) with auto-refresh and trend/page view charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images with image picker dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, automatic redirect on successful login, and session cleanup.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: main banner, vehicle highlights (family/commercial), CTA banner, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article detail view, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for customer inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, down payment, tenor, message) and contact information display.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public vehicle detail page for family cars showing images, price, variant/color selector, product interactions, specifications, and features tabs with CTA buttons.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public page displaying a grid of family vehicle cards, showing up to 8 published vehicles from the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public page displaying commercial vehicles filtered by category from URL params, showing up to 8 vehicles in a grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Displays detailed information for a commercial vehicle, including variants, specifications, features, pricing, and product interactions with tabs for specs and features.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page for commercial vehicles that displays three category cards (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) with navigation to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page showing a development message for promotions section.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor, then submits the simulation request.
Placeholder page showing a development message for testimonials section.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all application entities including vehicles, variants, colors, images, specifications, features, promotions, testimonials, blog posts, media assets, settings, users, and visitor stats.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate with standard amortization formula.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Contains validation functions for common form inputs including required fields, email, phone, length constraints, numeric values, and URLs.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides utilities for visitor tracking including session ID generation, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a web application with visitor statistics tracking system, including architectural notes about database schema, middleware, session management, and API security, with a known issue that visitor statistics are showing 0 values and existing features for frontend tracking middleware and stats display components.
